languages.text: "Это вы, господин канонир, верно говорите. Помню, в прежние времена таких оборванцев и близко сюда не подпускали, а теперь — извольте видеть. Странные дела, конечно".

traits.locale_text: "Это вы, господин канонир, верно говорите. Помню, в прежние времена таких оборванцев на пушечный выстрел сюда не подпускали, а теперь — извольте видеть. Странные дела, конечно".

languages.text: "You have the right of it, master gunner. I remember in the old days they wouldn't let riffraff like that anywhere near here, but now look where we are. Strange times, indeed."
languages.original_text: "Это вы, господин канонир, верно говорите. Помню, в прежние времена таких оборванцев и близко сюда не подпускали, а теперь — извольте видеть. Странные дела, конечно".

traits.locale_text: "You have the right of it, master gunner. I remember in the old days they wouldn't let riffraff like that anywhere near here, but now look where we are. Strange times, indeed."
"You have the right of it, master gunner. I remember in the old days they wouldn't let riffraff like that anywhere near here, but now look where we are. Strange times, indeed."
"You have the right of it, master gunner. I remember in the old days they wouldn't let riffraff like that anywhere near here, but now look where we are. Strange times, indeed."

languages.text: 「マスター・ガンナー、あなたは正しいですよ。昔は、そんな雑魚はここ近くにも来させなかったのに、今はどうなっているか。本当に奇妙な時代ですね」
languages.original_text: "You have the right of it, master gunner. I remember in the old days they wouldn't let riffraff like that anywhere near here, but now look where we are. Strange times, indeed."

languages.text: "Haklısın topçu. Eskiden ayaktakımını buranın yakınına bile yaklaştırmazlardı. O günleri iyi hatırlıyorum. Bir de şimdiki hâle bak. Gerçekten tuhaf zamanlar."
languages.original_text: "You have the right of it, master gunner. I remember in the old days they wouldn't let riffraff like that anywhere near here, but now look where we are. Strange times, indeed."

traits.locale_text: "Haklısın topçu. Eskiden ayaktakımını buranın yakınına bile yaklaştırmazlardı. O günleri iyi hatırlıyorum. Bir de şimdiki hâle bak. Gerçekten tuhaf zamanlar."

languages.text: “你说得在理，炮术长。从前这种贱民根本不准靠近这儿，如今却……这世道真是变了。”
languages.original_text: "You have the right of it, master gunner. I remember in the old days they wouldn't let riffraff like that anywhere near here, but now look where we are. Strange times, indeed."

traits.locale_text: “你说得在理，炮术长。从前这种贱民根本不准靠近这儿，如今却……这世道真是变了。”

languages.text: "Ihr habt das Recht dazu, Meisterschütze. Ich erinnere mich noch an Zeiten, in denen sie ein solches Gesindel hier nie geduldet hätten, und jetzt das. Wir leben wahrlich in seltsamen Zeiten."
languages.original_text: "You have the right of it, master gunner. I remember in the old days they wouldn't let riffraff like that anywhere near here, but now look where we are. Strange times, indeed."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr habt das Recht dazu, Meisterschütze. Ich erinnere mich noch an Zeiten, in denen sie ein solches Gesindel hier nie geduldet hätten, und jetzt das. Wir leben wahrlich in seltsamen Zeiten."

languages.text: « Vous en avez parfaitement le droit, maître artilleur. Je me souviens, avant, on ne laissait pas cette vermine s'approcher d'ici, mais voilà où on en est… Nous vivons une époque bien étrange. »
languages.original_text: "You have the right of it, master gunner. I remember in the old days they wouldn't let riffraff like that anywhere near here, but now look where we are. Strange times, indeed."

traits.locale_text: « Vous en avez parfaitement le droit, maître artilleur. Je me souviens, avant, on ne laissait pas cette vermine s'approcher d'ici, mais voilà où on en est… Nous vivons une époque bien étrange. »

languages.text: «Así es, maestro artillero. En los viejos tiempos, no dejaban que la chusma se acercara siquiera, pero ya ves cómo son ahora. Corren tiempos extrañas».
languages.original_text: "You have the right of it, master gunner. I remember in the old days they wouldn't let riffraff like that anywhere near here, but now look where we are. Strange times, indeed."

traits.locale_text: «Así es, maestro artillero. En los viejos tiempos, no dejaban que la chusma se acercara siquiera, pero ya ves cómo son ahora. Corren tiempos extrañas».
